name: La Raza Nation
description: La Raza Nation is a Hispanic (Mexican/Central American) Folk Nation street gang founded in Chicago in 1973. Colors are green, white, and red (Mexican flag). Though Folk-affiliated, they've warred with fellow Folk gangs including Gangster Disciples and Maniac Latin Disciples. Expanded beyond Chicago to Wisconsin, Ohio, Florida, and Georgia. In 1985, opened a chapter in West Humboldt Park ('DK Town'). In 2004, 89 high-ranking members arrested in Naples, FL. In 2005, listed by ICE as one of 54 violent gangs targeted in Operation Community Shield. 17% of US law enforcement agencies reported La Raza presence in their jurisdictions. Symbols include the Mexican flag, cross, and six-point star.
